titles.text: Tantei Jinguji Saburo: Tomoshibi ga Kienu Ma ni
探偵神宮寺三郎 灯火が消えぬ間に

descriptions.text: Tomisibi ga keinu ma ni (aka Touka ga Kienu Aidani) (lit. While the Light Remains) is the seventh game in the series. As with previous entries in the series, the game progresses mostly through menu selection, as you slowly piece together a solution to the case. The game features multiple endings.
An injured young man suddenly takes refuge at the detective agency. Investigation of two cases becomes complex as they are gradually woven together.
